app.name: Video Composer
app.purpose: Web dashboard to configure multi-brand marketing videos (Remotion templates), preview in-browser, and export MP4 via a server-side render API.

routing.description: The home page loads the full dashboard. There is no multi-page in-app navigation for the main workflow.

authentication.note: Password is defined in code (SIMULATED_AUTH_PASSWORD). Not production-grade auth.
userFlow: On load, if not signed in, only the SignInModal is shown.
Successful password sets localStorage and reveals the dashboard.
Sign out in the header clears storage and returns to the sign-in modal.

main.layout: Sidebar + preview panel (desktop); mobile tab bar switches between Configure and Preview.
main.leftColumn: Scrollable config area with GlassCard collapsible sections.
main.rightColumn: Sticky Remotion Player (VideoPreview); ssr:false dynamic import.

leftColumn.pattern: GlassCard collapsible sections (open/close state per card). Template mode selected via TemplateModePills at the top, sticky.

sectionsInOrder.title: Identity
sectionsInOrder.action: Brand selector (BrandSelector). Logo picker (LogoPicker), show/hide toggle, position nudge (LogoPositionControls). Expandable 'Brand media library' (BrandMediaLibrary) — bulk photo upload to Firestore-backed library, requires Firebase config.

sectionsInOrder.title: Content
sectionsInOrder.action: Upload media for the selected template: single hero image (MediaUploader), before+after pair, or carousel slides (CarouselSlidesEditor). Each uploader has an optional 'Pick from library' button when Firebase is configured.

sectionsInOrder.title: Style
sectionsInOrder.action: Text colors (VideoTextColors), copy fields (service title, subtitle, price tag), fonts (ServiceFontPicker x2), text size scale (VideoTextSizeSlider), background video + music (BackgroundMusicControls), video length (VideoDurationControl).

sectionsInOrder.title: AI copy
sectionsInOrder.action: Gemini 2.5 Flash caption generator. Brand context textarea (saved to Firestore brandContexts/{brandId}). Prompt input + Generate button calls POST /api/gemini. Output shown as plain text with a Copy button. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY server env var and Firebase config for brand context persistence.

leftColumn.exportBar: Sticky bottom bar (ExportBar) — enabled only when brand, logo (if shown), and content are all ready. Triggers RenderAndDownload flow.

rightColumn.title: Preview
rightColumn.note: Remotion Player (VideoPreview); live preview; loaded with ssr:false. Mobile: shown in the Preview tab.

requires.logoIfShown: If 'Show logo in video' is on, a logo file must be selected

modes.stateResetOnSwitch: Changing template mode clears uploaded images and resets carousel slides.

requires.logoIfShown: If show logo is on, a logo file must be selected

requires.images: At least one slide; every slide must have an image file
requires.logoIfShown: If show logo is on, a logo file must be selected

textSizeScale.role: Single multiplier for every text size in Remotion templates (headline, subtitle, price tag, service line, carousel titles).

logoPosition.logoOffsetXPx: Extra horizontal translate in px (positive moves right).
logoPosition.logoOffsetYPx: Extra vertical translate in px (positive moves down); before/after template combines with vertical centering.

clientSteps: User clicks 'Export MP4' in RenderAndDownload (disabled until canExport is true).
Client builds inputProps via getInputProps() in dashboard-client (validation errors surface to the user).
Client POSTs JSON to /api/render with { compositionId, inputProps, sessionId }.
On success, response body is MP4 bytes; client triggers download with a filename based on composition and brandId.
On failure, client shows parsed error message.
serverStepsSummary: After validation, normalizeRenderInputProps clamps textSizeScale and logoOffsetXPx/logoOffsetYPx (see src/app/api/render/route.ts and config files under src/config/).
Bundle Remotion entry (cached) from src/remotion/index.ts with webpack override for @/ alias.
selectComposition + renderMedia; onProgress updates in-memory progress store keyed by sessionId.
exportFlow.progressLimitation: Progress is in-memory in the same Node process. Multi-instance serverless may not show accurate progress.

apiEndpoints.role: Server-side Remotion bundle + renderMedia; returns MP4 or JSON error.
Polling progress for an active render session.
Lists scanned music and background assets under public/.
Lists logo files for a brand folder under public/assets/logos/.

apiEndpoints.response: { text } on success, { error } on failure
apiEndpoints.role: Proxies to Gemini 2.5 Flash to generate a Facebook/Instagram caption. Injects a system-style preamble, the brand context, and the user prompt. Reads GEMINI_API_KEY from server env (never NEXT_PUBLIC_*). Returns 503 if key is not set, 429 on quota exceeded.

staticAssets.optionalBackgrounds: public/backgrounds/ (and similar paths scanned by API)

mediaSourcingForAgents.whenNoLocalContent: If the user has no photos, videos, logos, background clips, or music on disk, the agent may search the public web to find suitable assets, then download them locally and use the app’s upload and picker controls as usual. The UI only accepts files the user (or agent on their behalf) provides—it does not fetch media from the internet by itself.
suggestedSources: Google Images (use Tools → Usage rights to filter for reuse-allowed images when appropriate)
Other image search engines or stock sites (e.g. Unsplash, Pexels, Pixabay for often permissively licensed photos)
Stock video or audio libraries for optional background video and music tracks compatible with the project license
workflow: Search for visuals that match the brand, template mode (before/after pair, single hero, or carousel slides), and aspect ratio needs (vertical 9:16 works well for this composer).
Download files to the machine, then upload them through MediaUploader, CarouselSlidesEditor, LogoPicker, or place them under public/ for backgrounds/music if deploying or developing locally.
Prefer royalty-free, CC0, or explicitly licensed assets when the video will be published commercially; avoid copyrighted material without permission.
mediaSourcingForAgents.legalNote: Agents should remind users that they are responsible for rights to all images, video, music, and logos used in exports. Automated scraping of Google Images without checking license terms is risky; prefer sources with clear license terms.

imageCrop.description: After upload, users can open Crop & position (ImageCropModal) with react-easy-crop; Apply exports JPEG with max long side 1920px.

remotion.bundlerAlias: src/remotion/webpack-override.ts maps @ to src (must match tsconfig paths).

firebaseIntegration.enabledWhen: All NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* env vars are set. isFirebaseConfigured() in src/lib/firebase.ts gates all Firebase features.

firestoreCollections.usedBy: AI copy assistant (AiCopyAssistant) — per-brand plaintext context fed to Gemini

firebaseIntegration.requiredFirestoreRules: Both collections must be readable/writable by authenticated users. See docs/media-library-setup.md.
firebaseIntegration.requiredStorageCors: cors.json at repo root — apply with gcloud storage buckets update. Required for Pick from library to work.

aiCopyAssistant.purpose: Generate Facebook and Instagram post captions per brand using Gemini 2.5 Flash.
aiCopyAssistant.uiSection: AI copy GlassCard — last section in the left column (id: ai-copy).
generationFlow: User edits brand context textarea → clicks Save (writes to Firestore brandContexts/{brandId}).
User writes a prompt (e.g. 'Promote our Mother's Day offer, 20% off').
Click Generate caption → POST /api/gemini with { brandName, brandContext, userPrompt }.
Server builds a system-style prompt with the brand context prepended, calls Gemini 2.5 Flash.
Response { text } shown in a plain-text output panel.
Copy button writes the caption to the clipboard via navigator.clipboard.writeText.
aiCopyAssistant.outputFormat: Plain text — hook, main message, call to action, hashtags on last line. No markdown.
aiCopyAssistant.serverEnvRequired: GEMINI_API_KEY — runtime only, never NEXT_PUBLIC_*. Set in Railway Variables; no Dockerfile ARG needed.

errorHandling.blocked: 422 with block reason from Gemini promptFeedback

deploymentNotesForAgents.summary: Server-side render needs FFmpeg and a Chromium bundle; production uses Docker with Next standalone plus full node_modules and src/ for the bundler. See Dockerfile and docs/deployment.md.
deploymentNotesForAgents.renderEnvironment: src/lib/render-environment.ts may block export on certain serverless hosts unless env escape hatches are set.

envVarNotes.NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_*: Must be present at next build time (compile-time inlining). In Docker/Railway, declared as ARG + ENV in the builder stage.
envVarNotes.GEMINI_API_KEY: Runtime only — read by the Node server process. No Dockerfile ARG needed. Set in Railway Variables and .env.local.

verification: npm run verify:remotion — compile Remotion bundle without full Next build
npm run verify — verify:remotion + lint + build
